title: SIMPLE.
FAST.
REAL.
hero.intro: No discovery sprints. No design thinking workshops. We build what works and ship it.

cards.title: YOU TELL US THE PROBLEM
cards.description: What needs to work? What's the deadline? What's it worth to you? That's the start.

cards.title: WE BUILD A WORKING VERSION
cards.description: Fast. Not perfect. Something you can touch, test, and break. That's the point.

cards.title: WE LAUNCH IT
cards.description: It goes live. You start seeing results. We iterate based on what's actually happening.

sections.title: READY TO SHIP?
sections.body: Tell us what you need built. We'll tell you if it's realistic, what it costs, and how fast we can get it running.
